issues.description: Trigger is 'OnAttacked' but card text states 'When your opponent activates an Event or [Blocker]'. Should be 'Trigger' with custom activation condition, not a standard trigger.
Action is 'RevealFromHand' but card text says 'reveal up to 1 card from the top of your Life cards'. Should be a Life reveal action (likely custom or different action type), not hand reveal.
Power boost amount is fixed at 1000, but text states '+1000 power per 1 cost on the revealed card'. Amount should be dynamic based on revealed card's cost, not a flat 1000.

Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says 'during this turn', which implies the boost lasts through the current turn. Should verify if 'EndOfTurn' is correct interpretation or if duration needs adjustment.
